children.heading: .—In General
children.label: a .—In General
children.text: If the United States trustee has appointed an individual under to serve as standing trustee in cases under this subchapter, and if such individual qualifies as a trustee under , then that individual shall serve as trustee in any case under this subchapter. Otherwise, the United States trustee shall appoint one disinterested person to serve as trustee in the case or the United States trustee may serve as trustee in the case, as necessary.section 586(b) of title 28section 322 of this title
perform the duties specified in paragraphs (2), (5), (6), (7), and (9) of ;section 704(a) of this title

perform the duties specified in paragraphs (3), (4), and (7) of , if the court, for cause and on request of a party in interest, the trustee, or the United States trustee, so orders;section 1106(a) of this title

children.label: A
children.text: the value of property subject to a lien;

children.label: B
children.text: confirmation of a plan filed under this subchapter;

children.label: C
children.text: modification of the plan after confirmation; or

children.label: D
children.text: the sale of property of the estate;
ensure that the debtor commences making timely payments required by a plan confirmed under this subchapter;

children.label: A
children.text: perform the duties specified in section 704(a)(8) and paragraphs (1), (2), and (6) of ; andsection 1106(a) of this title

children.label: B
children.text: be authorized to operate the business of the debtor;
if there is a claim for a domestic support obligation with respect to the debtor, perform the duties specified in ; andsection 704(c) of this title
facilitate the development of a consensual plan of reorganization.

children.heading: .—In general
children.label: 1 .—In general
children.text: If the plan of the debtor is confirmed under , the service of the trustee in the case shall terminate when the plan has been substantially consummated, except that the United States trustee may reappoint a trustee as needed for performance of duties under subsection (b)(3)(C) of this section and .section 1191(a) of this titlesection 1185(a) of this title

children.heading: .—Service of notice of substantial consummation
children.label: 2 .—Service of notice of substantial consummation
children.text: Not later than 14 days after the plan of the debtor is substantially consummated, the debtor shall file with the court and serve on the trustee, the United States trustee, and all parties in interest notice of such substantial consummation.
